real HTTP against a throwaway PORT=8931 backend (env -u SPEXCODE_API_URL, polled /health): GET /api/edit for three paths in this worktree — (A) untracked brand-new node .spec/…/tmp-edit-probe/spec.md returns a NON-empty all-additions diff carrying its full 7-line body (new file mode 100644, +++ b/…spec.md), not {patch:""}; (B) tracked spec.md with no pending change returns {patch:""} (no false positive); (C) tracked spec.md with an uncommitted edit returns its real working-tree diff (the probe-line addition). Probe files reverted after.

curl against the same throwaway PORT=8931 backend: first GET /api/board → 200 + ETag "76881daf…" over the 349617-byte body; refetch with matching If-None-Match → 304 Not Modified, 0 body bytes, same ETag echoed; refetch with stale If-None-Match "deadbeef" → full 200 with the 349617-byte body. Standard conditional-request HTTP, no poll-path special-casing.

Server-side reaping (tooth 5). Proven: @hono/node-server serve() with the timeouts passed via serverOptions AT CONSTRUCTION reaps a stalled/partial request with a 408 — 2.2s at a 500ms sweep, 29.9s at the production values (headersTimeout=20s, connectionsCheckingInterval=10s) incl. an upgrade listener mirroring injectWebSocket. Setting them post-serve() is INERT (sweep stays on 30s default). Active board-stream SSE STAYS OPEN past the window (requestTimeout bounds receiving a request, not the response). Raw-TCP supervisor proxy now reaps the peer on either-side close, truncation-safe via writableEnded. NOTE: the full spawned-child e2e is flaky to OBSERVE on the load-41 box (contended loop starves the unref'd sweep past 80s) — the incident's own condition; identical config reaps at ~30s in isolation.

Untracked new node → non-empty all-additions diff carrying the full spec.md body; tracked-unchanged → empty (no false positive); tracked-with-uncommitted-edit → real working-tree diff including the probe line.
200 + ETag on first GET (430084 bytes); matching If-None-Match → 304 with zero-byte body, same ETag echoed; stale If-None-Match → full 200 body again.

Second serve on a busy port: exit 1, one loud 'supervisor cannot bind — port 18787 is already in use. Free :18787 …' line, its transient child reaped (no zombie), first serve untouched. Second dashboard on a busy port: exit 1 with the identical 'cannot bind' line — one condition, one behaviour on both surfaces.

Re-measured at e7468ead (client now actually rides this path). 200 + ETag 1f0d628e…, matching If-None-Match -> 304 Not Modified with ZERO body bytes (curl wrote no output file) echoing same ETag; stale If-None-Match -> full 200 (432687 bytes). Standard conditional HTTP, no poll special-case.

Re-measured at e7468ead. Untracked new node -> NON-empty all-additions diff carrying full spec.md body; tracked-unchanged -> {patch:""} (no false positive); tracked-with-uncommitted-edit -> real working-tree diff (+probe line). Probe artifacts cleaned after.

Re-measured at e7468ead. Partial-header stall socket: server sent 408 Request Timeout + closed at 23.8s (headersTimeout 20s + 10s connectionsCheckingInterval — never the multi-minute Node default). Concurrent /api/board/stream SSE held across the reap window: still open at +29s, ping bytes flowing (133B). Active response untouched, stalled conn reaped.
real backend :8912 (throwaway serve of this worktree): fresh GET 200 + ETag over 457KB body; matching If-None-Match → 304, 0 bytes, same ETag echoed; stale If-None-Match → full 200 body

real backend :8912, this worktree as source: untracked new node → non-empty all-additions patch with full body; tracked-unchanged (spec-cli/spec.md) → {patch:''}; tracked with uncommitted edit → real working-tree diff. Fixtures reverted after.

real CLI on :8912/:8913: second serve exits 1 with one loud 'cannot bind — port in use. Free :P' line, its private child (:40345) reaped (no zombie listener, before/after diff empty), first serve untouched; second dashboard exits 1 with the same line, first dashboard keeps serving 200

real backend :8912 via supervisor proxy: partial-headers socket got 408 + server-side close at 20.0s (headersTimeout), proxy propagated so the public socket freed too; active /api/board/stream SSE stayed open through 42s idle. (First probe falsely read no-reap: paused client socket without a data listener never sees the FIN — instrumentation, not the server.)

stalled partial-header socket got 408 + server close at 22.6s (headersTimeout 20s + ≤10s sweep) THROUGH the supervisor proxy; concurrent SSE stream still open past 30s. re-measured after board stderr-hint: untracked new node → non-empty all-additions diff (not {patch:''}), so overlay edit tab shows just-created content; tracked-unchanged → empty (no false positive); tracked-edited → real working-tree diff

re-measured after board stderr-hint: second serve on busy port → exit 1, 'cannot bind — port P is already in use' line, NO zombie child (its private port freed), first serve untouched; second dashboard on busy port → identical loud exit 1 + 'cannot bind' line

re-measured after board stderr-hint: slow-loris (trickle incomplete headers forever) → server closes w/ 408 at ~26s (~headersTimeout 20s + sweep interval 10s); active SSE /api/board/stream held 30s → stayed open (433 bytes received) — active responses untouched

live :8787 backend: 200+ETag -> 304 bodyless on matching If-None-Match (same ETag echoed; curl wrote no body file) -> stale If-None-Match returns full 200 (508578 bytes). Standard conditional HTTP, no poll special-casing.

real backend /api/edit against this worktree: untracked brand-new node returns full all-additions diff (not patch:''), tracked-unchanged stays empty, tracked-edited returns its real working-tree diff.

real spex serve from HEAD: partial-header conn reaped at 29.6s (408+close, ~headersTimeout+check-interval) visible identically through the supervisor proxy; idle SSE survives 50s untouched. Live :8787 proxy predates 2026-07-06 supervise.ts change (supervisor never self-reloads) — deployment restart needed there, code honours contract.
worktree 后端 :8912 实测：首 GET 200+ETag（618056B）；匹配 If-None-Match → 304 零 body（curl 未落文件）同 ETag；过期 If-None-Match → 完整 200。标准条件请求，无轮询特例。

真实 /api/edit 对本 worktree：untracked 新节点 → 完整 all-additions diff（非 patch:''）；分支上从未动过的 tracked 路径 → {patch:''}（首测误用本分支已改的 id-url-safe 得到非空 diff——那是相对 fork-base 的真实变更，不是假阳性；换 graph 后为空）；tracked+未提交编辑 → 真实工作树 diff。探针产物已清理。

slow-loris（每 2s 滴一个头字节、永不完成）经 supervisor :8912：服务端 408 Request Timeout + 关闭于 23.7s（headersTimeout 20s + 10s sweep），代理把关闭传播到公网侧 socket；并发 SSE /api/board/stream 40s 全程存活（133B ping）。注意：完全静默的半请求 socket 在 Node 18/20/22/24 上均不会被收割（headersTimeout 在 parser 收到新数据时强制）——历史读数的『partial』也是滴流，本探针形状与之对齐。

占用 :8912 上二次 spex serve → exit 1 + 'supervisor cannot bind — port 8912 is already in use. Free :8912…'，其先启的私有 child :44669 已不监听（无僵尸），首个 serve /health 不受影响；spex dashboard 双开 :5299 → 二次同样响亮 exit 1 + cannot bind。
